transcription.text: There's a new automotive standard emerging in this country, with a reputation for quality second to none, and a desire to make it even better. Introducing the men and women of Toyota Motor Manufacturing in Georgetown, Kentucky. They just couldn't leave well enough alone.

Introducing the men and women of Toyota Motor Manufacturing in Georgetown, Kentucky.
